subject: tight passageway
fact: The tunnel narrowed to a tight passageway with high ceilings.
source_quote: The tunnel eventually narrowed to a tight passageway with high ceilings

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim refused to lead the way through the narrow passage.
source_quote: Bramgrim refused to lead the way

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim pointed out that the narrow passage would be an ideal place for an ambush from above.
source_quote: pointing out that it would be an ideal place for an ambush from above

subject: Daein
fact: Daein spotted bat-like creatures lurking in the shadows above using his keen observation skills.
source_quote: Daein spotted bat-like creatures lurking in the shadows above

subject: cloakers
fact: Akritas identified the creatures as cloakers.
source_quote: Akritas identified them as cloakers

subject: cloakers
fact: Cloakers are mysterious and intelligent predators of the Underdark.
source_quote: mysterious and intelligent predators of the Underdark

subject: cloakers
fact: Cloakers descended from above to attack their prey.
source_quote: that descended from above to attack their prey

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas wove her spell of concealment.
source_quote: Akritas wove her spell of concealment

subject: party movement
fact: The party carefully crept through the narrow passage.
source_quote: the party carefully crept through the narrow passage

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur made a misstep.
source_quote: Despite another misstep from Felkur

subject: cloaker evasion
fact: The party successfully evaded the cloakers without being detected.
source_quote: they successfully evaded the cloakers without being detected

subject: edge of the cave
fact: The party reached the edge of the cave.
source_quote: the party reached the edge of the cave

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The party prepared to continue deeper into the Howling Pits.
source_quote: prepared to continue deeper into the Howling Pits

subject: fire giant encounter
fact: The party was forced to flee from the fire giants.
source_quote: forced to flee from the fire giants

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim protested as Akritas and Daein grabbed him to flee from the fire giants.
source_quote: Protesting as Akritas and Daein grab him to flee from the fire giants

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim said, "There will be no dwarf tossing!"
source_quote: "There will be no dwarf tossing!"

subject: Bramgrim unconscious
fact: Bramgrim was knocked unconscious by a critical hit from a fire giant.
source_quote: Bramgrim is knocked unconscious by a critical hit from a fire giant

subject: Bramgrim damage
fact: The critical hit from the fire giant dealt seventy-four points of damage in a single blow.
source_quote: dealing seventy-four points of damage in a single blow

subject: party flight
fact: The devastating attack forced the party to flee from the encounter.
source_quote: The devastating attack forces the party to flee from the encounter

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim smugly explained Cave Creepers to Akritas after she failed her nature check.
source_quote: Smugly explaining Cave Creepers to Akritas after she failed her nature check

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim stated, "I don't know. I never wanted to say this, but you know, it's not that you're a surface dweller. I'm an Underdark creature, and I can tell these mushrooms even if you couldn't."
source_quote: "I don't know. I never wanted to say this, but you know, it's not that you're a surface dweller. I'm an Underdark creature, and I can tell these mushrooms even if you couldn't."

subject: Felkur catapult failure
fact: Felkur rolled a natural one on his Catapult spell against a fire giant.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural one on his Catapult spell against a fire giant

subject: Felkur damage
fact: Felkur's spell dealt only four points of damage.
source_quote: dealing only four points of damage

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas rolled a natural twenty on initiative.
source_quote: Akritas and Daein both roll natural twenties on initiative

subject: Daein
fact: Daein rolled a natural twenty on initiative.
source_quote: Akritas and Daein both roll natural twenties on initiative

subject: companion rescue
fact: Akritas and Daein swiftly grabbed their companions to escape the fire giants.
source_quote: swiftly grab their companions to escape the fire giants

subject: The Waydown
fact: The party returned to The Waydown, a familiar sinkhole entrance to the Underdark.
source_quote: The party returns to The Waydown, a familiar sinkhole entrance to the Underdark

subject: soldiers
fact: Two nervous soldiers were guarding a newly constructed wall at The Waydown.
source_quote: encounter two nervous soldiers guarding a newly constructed wall

subject: soldiers
fact: The soldiers were wearing splint armor with shields, longswords, and short bows.
source_quote: soldiers in splint armor with shields, longswords, and short bows

subject: Red Plumes
fact: The soldiers mentioned their commander, Vuhm Yestral, has returned to the city with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes.
source_quote: returned to the city with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the soldiers at The Waydown.
source_quote: their commander, Vuhm Yestral

subject: soldier patrol history
fact: The soldiers explained that a patrol used to go down once a day to clear the area of threats.
source_quote: a patrol used to go down once a day to clear the area of threats

subject: soldiers
fact: The soldiers stated they have never ventured below and have no desire to.
source_quote: they themselves have never ventured below and have no desire to

subject: party descent
fact: The party descended into the sinkhole.
source_quote: The party descends into the sinkhole

subject: underground river
fact: The sinkhole leads to a swift-flowing underground river one hundred feet below.
source_quote: leads to a swift-flowing underground river one hundred feet below

subject: journey duration
fact: The journey to the Howling Pits took approximately two days.
source_quote: takes approximately two days

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided accurate directions and a map for the journey.
source_quote: guided by Murssvayas's accurate directions and map

subject: Underdark
fact: The party entered the Underdark, characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness.
source_quote: characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness

subject: Underdark travel
fact: The party traversed rough and less worn tunnels and caves, continuously enveloped in darkness.
source_quote: traverse rough and less worn tunnels and caves, continuously enveloped in darkness

subject: Underdark encounter
fact: For the first time, the party encountered no problems during their journey through the Underdark.
source_quote: encounters no problems during their journey through the Underdark

subject: magical gloves
fact: The party decided to craft magical gloves for the Owlbear that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage.
source_quote: decide to craft magical gloves for the Owlbear that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage

subject: magical gloves
fact: The crafting of the gloves costs one hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: costs one hundred gold pieces

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: Daein purchased Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: Daein purchases Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces

subject: darkvision acquisition
fact: The Goggles of Night finally granted Daein darkvision like the rest of the party.
source_quote: finally granting him darkvision like the rest of the party

subject: Daein
fact: The party joked about Daein being the only one without darkvision before his purchase.
source_quote: The party jokes about Daein being the only one without darkvision

subject: Daein
fact: Everyone glared at Daein before his purchase.
source_quote: with everyone glaring at him before his purchase

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear companion has abilities including extra attack, multi-attack, improved critical, and increased proficiency bonus.
source_quote: abilities as a sidekick, including extra attack, multi-attack, improved critical, and increased proficiency bonus

subject: glove crafting completion
fact: The crafting of the gloves was completed during downtime before the expedition.
source_quote: completed during downtime before the expedition
